title: I Release Fear of Market Swings and Allow Long-Term Faith
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the anxiety that short-term financial fluctuations bring
excerpt: A short energy statement for when a market dip, income variation, or savings change has triggered financial anxiety. The release names the fear that short-term movement represents permanent loss; the allow points toward a long-term view grounded in calm trust.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 68 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the moment when a financial dip or variation has pulled attention toward anxiety — when you have just checked an account or seen a market number and noticed the anxious response.

content.text: A short energy statement for use in the moment when a financial fluctuation has pulled attention toward fear — a market dip, a variation in income, a savings number moving in the wrong direction. The release names the anxious response to short-term movement; the allow points toward the longer view.
I am ready to release every fear that short-term financial movement represents permanent loss or collapse. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow deep, long-term faith in the direction of my wealth, beyond whatever today's numbers show. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 68 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
